model: preliminary planning constants for image145844 candidate screening

strong_pi_podmr_screen.expected_resonance_scale: clear resonance should occur within +/-50 MHz if candidate is aligned similarly to the current field; 5 MHz spacing is screening-grade, not precision center extraction
strong_pi_podmr_screen.expected_contrast_scale: order 10-22 percent signal contrast for a usable transition, judged against raw readout noise and baseline; weak normalization-only features are not enough

ramsey_fft_guardrail_after_alignment.note: Choose det/tau grid after measured pODMR center; keep Nyquist above deliberate Ramsey carrier plus about f13C.
